mapper.select: SELECT pii.*, d.drug_name, d.specification, w.warehouse_name FROM purchase_in_item pii LEFT JOIN drug_info d ON pii.drug_id = d.drug_id LEFT JOIN warehouse w ON pii.warehouse_id = w.warehouse_id WHERE pii.in_id = #{inId} ORDER BY pii.create_time
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO purchase_in_item (in_item_id, in_id, item_id, drug_id, batch_no, production_date, expiry_date, in_num, purchase_price, subtotal, warehouse_id, location, operator_id, create_time) VALUES
(#{item.inItemId}, #{item.inId}, #{item.itemId}, #{item.drugId}, #{item.batchNo}, #{item.productionDate}, #{item.expiryDate}, #{item.inNum}, #{item.purchasePrice}, #{item.subtotal}, #{item.warehouseId}, #{item.location}, #{item.operatorId}, #{item.createTime})
